name: Cinnabon Rolls
recipeInstructions:
1. In a small bowl, combine water, yeast, and sugar. Stir until dissolved.
2. Set aside.
3. In a large bowl, prepare the pudding mix according to package directions. Add margarine, eggs, and salt. Mix well. Then add the yeast mixture. Blend.
4. Gradually add flour; knead until smooth. Place in a greased large bowl. Cover and let rise until doubled.
5. Punch down dough and let rise again.
6. Roll out on a floured board to 3.5 x 2-inch size.
7. Spread 1 cup softened butter over the surface.
8. In a small bowl, mix 2 cups brown sugar with 4 teaspoons cinnamon. Sprinkle over the top.
9. Roll up very tightly.
10. Make notches every 2 inches using a knife.
11. Cut rolls into pieces about 2 inches apart on a lightly greased cookie sheet.
12. Gently press down on each roll.
13. Cover and let rise until doubled again.
14. Bake at 350°F for 15-20 minutes, or until golden brown. Do not overbake.
15. Frost warm rolls with Cream Cheese Frosting.
CREAM CHEESE FROSTING
Combine all ingredients and mix until smooth. Makes about 20 very large rolls.
